species.citation: (Wall.) Benn. , Pl. Jav. Rar. (Bennett) (1840) 196; ≡ Itea fragrans Wall. , Fl. Ind. (Carey & Wallich) 2 (1824) 420. = Polyosma mutabilis Blume , Mus. Bot. 1 (1851) 261.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. PALAWAN.
Endemic to the Philippines. BILIRAN, LEYTE, PANAY, SIBUYAN.

species.citation: Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 659 ; Saw in Ng (ed.), Tree Fl. Malaya 4 (1989) 466; Paul et al., Blumea 69 (2024) 74; Type: from Java. = Polyosma apoensis Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1633 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 220. = Polyosma cyanea Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1637 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 220.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Borneo, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi, Thailand. BILIRAN, CAMIGUIN, CATANDUANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Apayao, Aurora, Benguet, Laguna, Mountain Province, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan, Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Surigao, PALAWAN, PANAY, SIBUYAN.
